Name: Crimson Education
Tagline: Discover top-tier university admissions counselling with Crimson Education, your gateway to leading universities across the US, UK & EU.
About: See Our Record-Breaking Class of 2030 Results!View Now We have helped students secure over 1,300 Ivy League university offers and counting. Students working with Crimson are 7x more likely to gain admission to the Ivy League and other top US universities.
Philosophy: “The average IB score for Ivy League admits last year was between 43 and 45, or straight As for A-Level students. While students need a wide range of achievement, academics are a cornerstone of the application process.” Get 1:1 tutoring with top 1% SAT/ACT coaches and experts in A-Level, IB, and AP subjects.
Outcomes: Hundreds of Crimson students have been admitted to top colleges, including every Ivy League, Stanford, MIT, Duke, Johns Hopkins and more. Crimson students are seeing strong 2030 results, with offers from leading colleges including Harvard, Yale, and Stanford.
Admissions: Even top Singapore students face intense competition when applying to US universities.
Quote: With top US universities turning away thousands of academically qualified students each year, it’s more important than ever to craft an application that truly stands out.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Crimson Education's coaches in Singapore are top 1% SAT/ACT experts with extensive experience in A-Level, IB, and AP tutoring, holding advanced degrees and certifications in education and counselling.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Crimson Education prioritizes student wellbeing through dedicated pastoral care, offering personalized counselling and building a supportive community to foster emotional resilience and mental health.
Performance.Academic Integration: Crimson Education integrates a rigorous curriculum focusing on IB, A-Level, and AP subjects, emphasizing a holistic educational philosophy that nurtures critical thinking and academic excellence.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Crimson Education students achieve remarkable success, with hundreds gaining admission to Ivy League universities and other top US institutions, showcasing a strong track record of competitive college placements.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Crimson Education's Singapore location features state-of-the-art learning spaces equipped with advanced technology, providing students access to modern resources that enhance their educational experience.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Crimson Education ensures ongoing accountability through regular progress reviews, detailed feedback sessions, and transparent communication with parents to monitor and enhance student performance.
